title: French Style Chicken
description: A classic French-inspired dish featuring tender chicken and a rich, flavorful sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the skillet.
Add the ca, xtra, kho, silky, vietnamese, and to to the skillet.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
